# ADR-YYYYMMDD-short-title

## Status

proposed / accepted / superseded

## Context

What problem or decision point exists?

## Decision

What did we decide?

## Rejected Options

- Option:
  - Why rejected:

## Consequences

What becomes easier?
What becomes harder?
What risks remain?

## Evidence

What data, tests, review, or constraints support the decision?

## Revisit Trigger

When should this decision be revisited?
